storyboard.content: I get bloating and discomfort in my stomach after eating, especially after dairy products
I feel full very quickly when I eat, even with small amounts of food
I sometimes get gassy and have cramps a few hours after meals
I occasionally get mild acid reflux symptoms
These symptoms have been gradually getting worse over the past 6 months
I can still work and do daily activities but the symptoms affect what I can eat and make social meals difficult
Symptoms are worst after large meals or specific foods like ice cream and cheese
